feedback_text: URGENT: System is completely down! Cannot access anything. Critical production issue!
The checkout process is broken and we're losing sales every minute. Fix this NOW!
Critical bug: Payment gateway failing with error 500. Customers can't complete purchases!
App crashes immediately on startup. Unusable! This is blocking our entire team.
CRITICAL: Data loss after update! All our records are gone. Need immediate help!
Terrible performance. Pages take 30+ seconds to load. Completely unacceptable.
Cannot export reports - getting timeout errors. This is breaking our workflow.
Login system is broken. Getting authentication errors constantly. Very frustrated.
The new update destroyed everything. Crashes, errors, data corruption. Awful!
Search functionality doesn't work at all. Returns no results. Major usability issue.
Love the new dark mode! Makes it so much easier on the eyes.
Excellent customer support team. Resolved my issue within minutes!
The reporting dashboard is fantastic. Exactly what we needed!
Great integration with our existing tools. Seamless workflow now.
Amazing features in the latest update. Keep up the great work!
The mobile app is incredibly smooth and responsive. Well done!
Export to PDF works perfectly. Thank you for adding this feature!
Really appreciate the detailed analytics. Very helpful for decision making.
The UI redesign is beautiful and intuitive. Much better than before.
Fast and reliable. No issues whatsoever. Highly recommended!
Would love to see bulk edit functionality for feedback items.
Please add keyboard shortcuts for common actions. Would save so much time.
Integration with Slack would be incredibly useful for our team.
Custom fields for feedback categorization would be a game changer.
Would be great to have scheduled reports sent via email.
API access would allow us to build custom integrations. Please consider!
Multi-language support would help us serve international customers.
The loading spinner sometimes gets stuck. Minor annoyance but noticeable.
Some text is hard to read in light mode. Contrast could be improved.
Occasional lag when switching between pages. Not a big deal though.
The tutorial could be more detailed for new users. Just a suggestion.
Table headers don't align properly with columns on smaller screens.
Would prefer if the sidebar was collapsible to save screen space.
The color scheme is nice overall but could use some refinement.
Navigation is good but could be more intuitive for first-time users.
Performance is decent but could be faster on slower connections.
Filter options are helpful but could be more granular for power users.
The app works well but notifications could be more customizable.
Overall solid experience with minor room for improvement here and there.
Good product with potential for some UX enhancements down the line.
Meets our basic needs but advanced features would make it excellent.
